title: Top Customer Without Losing Detail Rows
description: Find the single customer with the highest total spending while preserving original row-level detail during the calculation. If multiple customers tie on total spending, return the one with the higher customer_id.
sql_solution: WITH totals AS (SELECT customer_id, SUM(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id) total FROM orders), ranked AS (SELECT customer_id, total, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY total DESC, customer_id DESC) rn FROM totals) SELECT customer_id FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1;
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

totals_window = Window.partitionBy("customer_id")
ranking_window = Window.orderBy(col("total").desc(), col("customer_id").desc())

result = (
    orders.withColumn("total", sum("amount").over(totals_window))
    .withColumn("rn", row_number().over(ranking_window))
    .filter(col("rn") == 1)
    .select("customer_id")
)
